rationale: Clean Stage 1 add-alongside implementation: ExecuteBeadLoopRuntime strips all durable fields (Assignee, ReviewMaxRetries, cooldowns, harness/model/tier) and RunWithConfig translates rcfg+runtime back into ExecuteBeadLoopOptions before delegating to the existing Run. Test asserts observable behavior via the event sink (loop.start, execute-bead Actor, routing body) rather than synthetic telemetry, matching SD-024's test-coverage commitment, and a bonus zero-value-panics test verifies the sealed-construction invariant flows through.
